description: Silver steel case with a fixed bezel for durability, style and comfortStainless steel strap with a butterfly claspBlack dial with silver coloured hands just cavalli logo from the 12 hour mark across the dialThree chrongraphic displaysScrew to reset timeSolid case back for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when washing hands or light rainWarranty: 2 years
